name: Fruit Slicer Fun
description: Welcome to the dojo, ninja! Your mission: master the art of fruit slicing in Fruit Slicer Fun! Grab your blade and dive into the juicy action across three thrilling game modes. Aim for a new high score in Arcade mode by slicing fruit combos while avoiding bombs, and use special boosters like Double Score, Freeze, or Frenzy to maximize your points. Want a calmer experience? Relax and slice at your own pace in Zen Mode. Or test your skills in Classic Mode, where the challenge is to slice as much fruit as possible without dropping any or hitting bombs. Slice, dice, and become the ultimate fruit ninja today!
instructions: Mouse Click and Swipe over the fruits to cut them
tags: free html5 games for your website
